name: Dominic ★ Alpha
description:
Dominic likes to keep up appearances. The strict, cold alpha, that's who he is. But when Wade hires you—an ex-CEO with a tarnished reputation—to work alongside him managing the family business, you become a chip in his carefully maintained armor.

commission for PRAEFICA ❤️❤️

CLICK HERE FOR ALL ROCKWELL BOTS

Dominic Rockwell comes from the prestigious Rockwell Family. A family that is famous for only ever producing alphas, thanks to their unconventional lineage of alpha-only marriages. Dominic is the eldest of three brothers, all the model-example of what an alpha should be. At least to the media.

You are a CEO for a rival hotel business... Or, at least you were until a scandal ruined your reputation and you had to resign. The Rockwells didn't miss the opportunity to pull you over to their side, hiring you as a VP alongside Dominic. Needless to say, you two will be needing to spend a lot of time together.

NOTES:

Hope you like this one! {{user}} can be anything, but the scenario is intended for an alpha.

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts

GENERAL

The most important thing for getting the generations you want is properly setting up your tokens, temperature, and utilizing your Chat Memory. Here's a detailed guide so you can find what personally works for you.

av.rose's user guide
